value.found_quote: Administrators can prevent this mode by setting `permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode` to `"disable"` in [managed settings](#managed-settings).
value.rationale: The page describes managed/enterprise settings that can restrict permission modes — administrators can disable bypass permissions via `permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode` and restrict modes through managed settings that cannot be overridden. This substantiates the claim that enterprise configuration can restrict available permission modes and disable bypass permissions.
